ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal species */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Common name of the animal */,
  "latin_name" TEXT /* Latin name of the animal */,
  "also_known_as" TEXT /* Alternative names or aliases for the animal */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the animal belongs to */,
  "conservation_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation status of the animal */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the species in kilograms */,
  "average_length" REAL /* Average length of the species in meters */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or notes about the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_conservation_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("conservation_status_id") REFERENCES conservation_statuses ("conservation_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_statuses" (
  "conservation_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "iucn_code" TEXT /* IUCN Red List code for the conservation status */,
  "urgency_level" INTEGER /* Numerical value indicating the urgency of conservation efforts (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the habitat */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diets" (
  "diet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diet */,
  "diet_name" TEXT /* Name of the diet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diet */,
  "nutritional_value" TEXT /* Nutritional value of the diet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predators" (
  "predator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predator */,
  "predator_name" TEXT /* Name of the predator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predator */,
  "predation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of predation */,
  "hunting_method" TEXT /* Method used by the predator to hunt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("predator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "ecosystem" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_habitats" (
  "animal_habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-habitat relationship */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat */,
  "habitat_preference" TEXT /* Preference of the animal for the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_habitats_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_diets" (
  "animal_diet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-diet relationship */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "diet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diet */,
  "diet_preference" TEXT /* Preference of the animal for the diet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_diet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_diets_diet_id FOREIGN KEY ("diet_id") REFERENCES diets ("diet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_predators" (
  "animal_predator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-predator relationship */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "predator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predator */,
  "predation_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the predator on the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_predator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_predators_predator_id FOREIGN KEY ("predator_id") REFERENCES predators ("predator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_locations" (
  "animal_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-location relationship */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the population in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_sizes" (
  "population_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population size record */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population size was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population size data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to estimate the population size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_sizes_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threats" (
  "threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat record */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "threat" TEXT /* Name of the threat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the threat */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the threat on the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threats_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distinctive_features" (
  "distinctive_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distinctive feature record */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance of the feature for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distinctive_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distinctive_features_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)
